title: England in major injury boost as key man returns & starting XI 'leaked' for Panama World Cup tie including popular picks
original_text:
England in major injury boost as key man returns & starting XI 'leaked' for Panama World Cup tie including popular picks
BUKAYO SAKA has been named in the starting line-up for England’s World Cup clash with Panama.
The Three Lions are desperate to end the group stage on a high after their drab draw with Ghana earlier this week.
Thomas Tuchel has included Bukayo Saka in the starting line-up against Panama Credit: Getty
The Arsenal man has overcome an Achilles problem Credit: Getty
England chief Thomas Tuchel has already warned Panama will be difficult to break down because of defending in numbers.
But the former Chelsea chief has been handed a major injury boost after Saka, 24, has been given the all clear to start.
_note: 全文走 summary 块A(LLM三判后只增不改);processed=成熟仓库累积,raw=本次收集过程。
